meaning: 微软公司生产的制作幻灯片和简报的软件
examples: Most powerpoint presentations are prepared for screens in landscape format.
He said that his parents would sometimes help him by making PowerPoint presentations and creating handmade works.
When making the PowerPoint, the wording of the text should not be complicated.
But Bhusri came equipped with five PowerPoint slides detailing the Web opportunity he saw.
When you put words up on a PowerPoint slide, the words are for you.
